first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (6/10) and raise the exact same strengths and concerns: strong recent AI agent experience, but a lack of Python, insufficient years of AI-specific experience, and no mention of RAG/vector DBs. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not indicate any change in assessment due to the candidate's work history being located in Brazil versus various Western cities.
